name: skl
title: Skill Loader
description: Browse the skl skill catalogue and copy or paste a skill pointer outside tmux
author: connorads

commands.name: search-skills
commands.title: Search Skills
commands.description: Browse skl skills with a live pointer preview, then copy or paste the pointer

preferences.name: sklPath
preferences.title: skl Binary
preferences.description: Absolute path to the skl executable. Leave blank to use ~/.local/bin/skl.
